scripts.name: PE Parser
scripts.author: EJoyApp Team
scripts.description: A comprehensive and high-performance parser designed to deconstruct and analyze Windows Portable Executable (PE) binaries. It provides reverse engineers and security researchers with deep visibility into the internal structures, memory layout, and execution dependencies of Windows executables.
scripts.features:
• Comprehensive DOS Header & Rich Signature extraction
• NT Headers (COFF File Header & Optional Header) analysis
• Detailed Section Table parsing with entropy calculation
• Import Directory (IAT/INT) and Export Directory resolution
• Base Relocation Table & TLS Directory parsing
• Resource Tree (Icon, Version Info, Manifest) extraction
• Digital Signature & Security Directory validation

scripts.name: WIM Parser
scripts.author: EJoyApp Team
scripts.description: A high-performance parser for modern Windows deployment images. Provides deep visibility into the WIM header, decodes 56-bit resource flags, and features one-click FOA routing to the Metadata XML and SHA-1 Lookup Tables.
scripts.features:
• WIM Header parsing
• 56-bit resource flags decoding
• FOA routing to Metadata XML and SHA-1 Lookup Tables
• LZMS/LZX/XPRESS compression detection

scripts.name: RAR5 Parser
scripts.author: EJoyApp Team
scripts.description: An advanced parser for the modern RAR5 archive format. Features a custom VINT (Variable Length Integer) decoding engine to seamlessly separate variable-length headers, metadata, and compressed file data blocks.
scripts.features:
• VINT (Variable Length Integer) decoding engine
• Header, metadata, and compressed data block isolation
• RAR4 legacy signature detection

scripts.name: ZIP Parser
scripts.author: EJoyApp Team
scripts.description: A high-performance structural parser for the standard ZIP archive format. Parses Local File Headers and provides reverse-engineered FOA routing from the End of Central Directory (EOCD) back to the Central Directory records.
scripts.features:
• Local File Headers parsing
• End of Central Directory (EOCD) to Central Directory reverse routing
• Compressed data isolation
• Regex-based boundary scanning

scripts.name: 7z Parser
scripts.author: EJoyApp Team
scripts.description: An advanced structural parser for the 7-Zip archive format. Decodes the Signature Header and provides precise FOA routing to the Next Header, seamlessly isolating complex LZMA/LZMA2 compressed streams.
scripts.features:
• Signature Header decoding
• Precise FOA routing to Next Header
• LZMA/LZMA2 compressed stream isolation
• Encoded metadata property parsing

scripts.name: PPTX Parser
scripts.author: EJoyApp Team
scripts.description: A semantic parser for modern Microsoft PowerPoint documents (OOXML). Leverages high-speed regex boundary scanning and FOA hyperlinking to expose internal ZIP structures, isolating slides, media, and embedded OLE objects.
scripts.features:
• ZIP structure extraction
• High-speed regex boundary scanning
• Semantic color-coding for slides, media, and OLE objects
• Central Directory to Local File Header FOA routing

scripts.name: DOCX Parser
scripts.author: EJoyApp Team
scripts.description: A semantic parser for modern Microsoft Word documents (OOXML). Features regex-based boundary detection and color-coded structural analysis to instantly isolate document text, media, and potentially malicious payloads.
scripts.features:
• ZIP structure extraction
• Semantic isolation of document text, media, and malicious payloads
• Embedded OLE object highlighting
• Central Directory mapping

scripts.name: XLSX Parser
scripts.author: EJoyApp Team
scripts.description: A semantic parser for modern Microsoft Excel workbooks (OOXML). Provides deep visibility into the underlying ZIP structure, visually isolating shared string tables (SharedStrings), worksheets, and embedded macro vectors.
scripts.features:
• ZIP structure extraction
• SharedStrings table isolation
• Worksheet and embedded macro vector highlighting
• FOA jumps to raw XML streams

scripts.name: PDF Parser
scripts.author: EJoyApp Team
scripts.description: A structural parser for Adobe's Portable Document Format. Identifies the file header, isolates raw binary streams, and maps the Cross-Reference (xref) table to provide FOA navigation to internal objects and the trailer.
scripts.features:
• File header identification
• Raw binary stream isolation
• Cross-Reference (xref) table mapping
• FOA navigation to internal objects and trailer

scripts.name: NTFS Parser
scripts.author: EJoyApp Team
scripts.description: An industrial-grade forensic parser for raw NTFS volumes and disk images. Features intelligent MBR/GPT partition routing, BIOS Parameter Block (BPB) decoding, and LCN-to-FOA translation for instant jumps to the Master File Table ($MFT).
scripts.features:
• Intelligent MBR/GPT partition routing
• BIOS Parameter Block (BPB) decoding
• LCN-to-FOA translation
• Instant jumps to the Master File Table ($MFT)

scripts.name: FAT32 Parser
scripts.author: EJoyApp Team
scripts.description: A structural parser for the classic FAT32 file system. Calculates exact physical offsets (FOA) for the Reserved Area, FSInfo sector, Allocation Tables (FAT1/FAT2), and the dynamic Root Directory cluster chain.
scripts.features:
• Exact physical offsets (FOA) calculation
• Reserved Area and FSInfo sector parsing
• Allocation Tables (FAT1/FAT2) mapping
• Dynamic Root Directory cluster chain navigation

scripts.name: ExFAT Parser
scripts.author: EJoyApp Team
scripts.description: A modern parser tailored for high-capacity flash storage file systems. Decodes shift-based sector/cluster mathematics and provides direct FOA navigation to the FAT table and the continuous Cluster Heap data area.
scripts.features:
• Shift-based sector/cluster math decoding
• Direct FOA navigation to FAT table
• Continuous Cluster Heap data area mapping
• ExFAT VBR parsing

scripts.name: ext4 Parser
scripts.author: EJoyApp Team
scripts.description: A deep-dive parser for the standard Linux ext4 file system. Exposes the 1024-byte Superblock, Block Group Descriptor Tables (BGDT), and performs bit-shift offset calculations to locate the Root Directory (Inode 2).
scripts.features:
• 1024-byte Superblock exposure
• Block Group Descriptor Tables (BGDT) parsing
• Bit-shift offset calculations
• Root Directory (Inode 2) FOA location

scripts.name: VDI Parser
scripts.author: EJoyApp Team
scripts.description: A structural parser for Oracle VM VirtualBox dynamic disk images. Analyzes the Pre-header and Main Header, separating virtual capacity from physical allocation, and provides jumps to the Block Map and raw sectors.
scripts.features:
• Pre-header and Main Header analysis
• Virtual capacity vs physical allocation separation
• Block Map translation table parsing
• Raw sector FOA navigation

scripts.name: VMDK Parser
scripts.author: EJoyApp Team
scripts.description: A forensic parser for VMware monolithic sparse virtual disks. Extracts the embedded plaintext configuration descriptor and maps the dual-layer Grain Directory (L1) and Grain Table (L2) paging structures.
scripts.features:
• Embedded plaintext configuration descriptor extraction
• Dual-layer Grain Directory (L1) and Grain Table (L2) mapping
• Sparse Header and capacity calculation
• Data grain isolation

scripts.name: BMP Parser
scripts.author: EJoyApp Team
scripts.description: A structural parser for the uncompressed Windows Bitmap image format. Extracts the BITMAPFILEHEADER and BITMAPINFOHEADER, and maps exact physical offsets to the color palette and the raw pixel data array.
scripts.features:
• BITMAPFILEHEADER and BITMAPINFOHEADER extraction
• Physical offset mapping to color palette
• Raw pixel data array isolation

scripts.name: ICO Parser
scripts.author: EJoyApp Team
scripts.description: A precise parser for the Windows Icon resource format. Decodes the global ICONDIR header and provides one-click FOA routing from directory entries directly to the embedded BMP or PNG image payloads.
scripts.features:
• Global ICONDIR header decoding
• Directory entries parsing
• One-click FOA routing to embedded BMP or PNG payloads

scripts.name: JPEG Parser
scripts.author: EJoyApp Team
scripts.description: A marker-based parser for the JPEG image format. Traverses the segment chain to visually isolate APPn metadata (including EXIF), quantization tables (DQT), and the compressed entropy-coded image stream (SOS).
scripts.features:
• Segment chain traversal
• APPn metadata (including EXIF) isolation
• Quantization tables (DQT) highlighting
• Compressed entropy-coded image stream (SOS) isolation

scripts.name: PNG Parser
scripts.author: EJoyApp Team
scripts.description: A chunk-based parser for the lossless PNG image format. Validates the magic signature and iterates through all critical and ancillary chunks (IHDR, tEXt, IDAT, IEND) while visually isolating the Deflate-compressed image data.
scripts.features:
• Magic signature validation
• Critical and ancillary chunks (IHDR, tEXt, IDAT, IEND) iteration
• Deflate-compressed image data isolation

scripts.name: MP3 Parser
scripts.author: EJoyApp Team
scripts.description: A robust sequential parser for the MP3 audio format. Decodes ID3v1 and ID3v2 metadata tags, identifies VBR headers (Xing/Info), and visually isolates the continuous chain of MPEG audio frames.
scripts.features:
• ID3v1 and ID3v2 metadata tag decoding
• VBR header (Xing/Info) identification
• Continuous chain of MPEG audio frames isolation

scripts.name: MP4 Parser
scripts.author: EJoyApp Team
scripts.description: A hierarchical parser for the MP4 multimedia container. Recursively unwraps the Box/Atom architecture, providing deep visibility into the 'moov' metadata tree and instantly isolating the massive 'mdat' media payload.
scripts.features:
• Recursive Box/Atom architecture unwrapping
• Deep visibility into the 'moov' metadata tree
• 'mdat' media payload isolation

scripts.name: WAV Parser
scripts.author: EJoyApp Team
scripts.description: A chunk-based parser for the RIFF/WAV uncompressed audio format. Decodes the main RIFF header, analyzes the 'fmt ' audio specification block, and perfectly maps the boundaries of the raw PCM 'data' payload.
scripts.features:
• Main RIFF header decoding
• 'fmt ' audio specification block analysis
• Raw PCM 'data' payload boundary mapping
